scripts.build:all: npm run build:only && npm run build:test
scripts.deployBuild: npm run build-all && git diff --quiet dist || (git clean -fd dist && git checkout -- dist && npm version patch && npm run build-all && git add dist && git commit -m 'update production version') && git subtree push --prefix dist origin gh-pages
scripts.deployMinor: npm run build-all && git diff --quiet dist || (git clean -fd dist && git checkout -- dist && npm version minor && npm run build-all && git add dist && git commit -m 'update minor production version') && git subtree push --prefix dist origin gh-pages
scripts.deployTest: npm version prerelease --preid=test && npm run build:test && git add dist/test && git commit -m 'update test version' && git subtree push --prefix dist origin gh-pages
